{{Quote|You can't see T'da, or touch her, or speak to her. Does that mean she is any less alive in the Force?|Quinlan Vos|<ref name="r83" />}}
'''T'da''' was the pet of [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]].<ref name="r83" />

T'da died on the planet [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] where she was buried by Aayla and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. Aayla herself would eventually be killed there as part of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].<ref name="r83" />

==Behind the scenes==
While its species has not been officially revealed, [[Jan Duursema]] has stated in a thread that T'da was a "Felucian cat-bunny" whose species is currently unnamed.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.comicscommunity.com/boards/janduursema/?read=8016&expand=1|text=Jan Duursema|work=ComicsCommunity.com|archivedate=20090815005117}}</ref>
